LAW AND MOTION 302, INTERVENOR WILDA WHITE'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO INTERVENE IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JANUARY 14, 2013. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: LAVENNA WARD, CSR # 7077 =(302/MJM)
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-11-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY INTERVENOR WHITE, WILDA

LAW AND MOTION 302, INTERVENOR WILDA WHITE'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO INTERVENE IS GRANTED. MS. WHITE HAS A STATUTORY RIGHT TO INTERVENE UNDER GOV'T 12965. THE "ADEQUATELY REPRESENTED" ELEMENT OF MANDATORY INTERVENTION IN CCP 387(B) DOES NOT APPLY WHERE THERE IS A STATUTORY RIGHT TO INTERVENE. THE MOTION IS TIMELY AND ALLOWING INTERVENTION DOES NOT PREJUDICE DEFENDANT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-20-2013 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-17-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-16-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Intervenor Wilda White'S Motion For Leave To Intervene
Off Calendar Jan-14-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Monique Olivier, Esq. of Duckworth Peters Lebowitz Olivier LLP, Tel. 415.433.0333 x6, for intervenor and moving party;
Mark Koorenny, Esq. of Koorenny & Teitelbaum LLP, Tel. 805.373.2968, for defendant and opposing party;
David Cullen, Esq. of the Dept. of Fair Employment & Housing, Tel. 916.585.7108, for plaintiff, via court call.

RULING: The matter was argued. After arguments, the court adopted its tentative ruling. Intervenor Wilda White's Motion For Leave To Intervene is granted. Ms. White has a statutory right to intervene under Gov't 12965. The "adequately represented" element of mandatory intervention in CCP 387(b) does not apply where there is a statutory right to intervene. The motion is timely and allowing intervention does not prejudice defendant. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Motion For Leave To Intervene
Off Calendar Jan-11-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
INTERVENOR WILDA WHITE's Motion For Leave To Intervene is continued on the Court's own motion to January 14, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVenna Ward, CSR # 7077 =(302/MJM)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Set For Trial On Jun-10-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
